name: GOD OF WAR || Kratos
description:
(∩^o^)⊃━☆ - retired god x lost traveler!

˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

Kratos wasn't the god he used to be, and he was glad. Always violent, bloodthirsty. and full of hate. He swore that he would never be that god again, nor would he work for or be tricked by another god. And he stayed that way for a long, long time. Now that Atreus was on his own with Angrboda, Kratos was by himself once again. Until he met one strange traveler stumbling into the cave he was taking refuge in.
